title: Content Brief
description: Structured brief for an individual content piece, produced by /keyword-research and consumed by /seo-content. Contains target keyword, SERP analysis data, recommended structure, and writing guidelines. Enables automated handoff from keyword planning to content production.

title.description: Recommended article title, e.g. 'The Complete Guide to Cold Email for Freelancers'.

target_keyword.description: Primary keyword this content targets, e.g. 'cold email template freelancer'.

secondary_keywords.description: Secondary and related keywords to incorporate naturally throughout the content.

created_date.description: ISO 8601 date when this brief was created.

created_by.description: The skill that created this brief, typically '/keyword-research'.

cluster_ref.description: Name of the keyword cluster this brief belongs to, e.g. 'Cold Email Templates'.

content_type.description: The recommended content format based on SERP analysis.

search_intent.description: Dominant search intent for the target keyword.

keyword_metrics.description: Search metrics for the target keyword.

cpc.description: Cost per click in USD, indicating commercial value.

serp_analysis.description: Analysis of the current SERP landscape for the target keyword.

top_results.description: Summary of the top-ranking pages for this keyword.

title.description: Page title as shown in SERP.

word_count.description: Approximate word count of the ranking page.

content_type.description: Content format of the ranking page, e.g. 'listicle', 'guide', 'tool page'.

serp_features.description: SERP features present on the results page.

people_also_ask.description: Questions from the People Also Ask section. These should be addressed in the content.

content_gap.description: What existing top results fail to cover. This is the primary differentiation opportunity.

recommended_structure.description: Recommended article structure based on SERP analysis and content type.

target_word_count.description: Recommended word count based on top-ranking content analysis.

outline.description: Recommended H2/H3 outline for the article.

guidance.description: What this section should cover and why.

keywords_to_include.description: Secondary keywords to work into this section.

must_include.description: Elements the content must include to compete, e.g. 'real examples', 'downloadable template', 'comparison table'.

differentiation_angle.description: How to make this content stand out from existing top results.

voice_notes.description: Content-specific voice guidance. References the brand voice profile but may include adjustments, e.g. 'More authoritative than usual -- this is a definitive guide'.

internal_links.description: Recommended internal links to other content or pages.

anchor_text.description: Suggested anchor text for the link.

target_path.description: Path or URL to link to.

context.description: Where in the article to place this link.

cta.description: Primary call-to-action for this content piece.

text.description: CTA copy, e.g. 'Download the Cold Email Template Kit'.

placement.description: Where to place the CTA, e.g. 'After intro + end of article' or 'Inline after section 3'.

status.description: Current status of this content piece.

output_path.description: Path where the finished content will be written, e.g. './campaigns/content/cold-email-template-freelancer.md'.
